result.stdout:
Usage: add [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Arguments:
  [0] <string>

Options:
  --name <string>                (Default: @"")
  --description <string?>        (Default: null)
  --timeout <int>                (Default: 30)
  --retries <int>                (Default: 3)
  --expected-status <string>     (Default: @"200")
  --tags <string?>               (Default: null)
  --disabled                     (Optional)
  --no-discover                  (Optional)
  --interval <int>               (Default: 5)
  --db-path <string?>            (Default: null)

result.stdout:
Usage: watch [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Options:
  --tag <string?>                     (Default: null)
  --interval <int>                    (Default: 5)
  --use-endpoint-intervals <bool>     (Default: true)
  --parallel                          (Optional)
  --parallel-limit <int>              (Default: 5)
  --save-history <bool>               (Default: true)
  --format <string>                   (Default: @"human")
  --verbose                           (Optional)
  --db-path <string?>                 (Default: null)
